name: channelhub
description: Multi-session channel plugin for Claude Code — manage all your sessions from Telegram, web, or CLI

scripts.build: bun build src/daemon.ts --outfile dist/daemon.js --target bun --external playwright && bun build src/shim.ts --outfile dist/shim.js --target bun && bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target bun
